Driving a massive metal war machine at three miles per hour just to get shot by someone I can't even see.
Teamed up with randoms to collect purple gems, and they immediately ran directly into the enemy team with all of them.
I dropped a giant skeleton at the bridge, but they countered it with a swarm of cheap skeletons. I threw my phone.
Flailing my limbs wildly in my living room trying to match a neon silhouette while pop music blasts.
Two plumber brothers go to a neighboring kingdom and solve all their problems with turn-based combat and hammers.
Hiding behind crumbling green shields while an army of blocky aliens slowly marches down the screen faster and faster.
Shooting dual lasers at insect-like alien ships after one of them tried to abduct my fighter with a tractor beam.
Sneaking around in the dark wearing night-vision goggles with three green glowing lights that somehow nobody can see.
Surviving in a jungle by eating tree frogs and fighting a guy who controls bees, all while a James Bond-style theme song plays.
A witch with guns attached to her high heels fights angels using her own hair. It makes complete sense in context.
A retro platformer where I bounce on enemies using a gardening tool to save my partner.
Using a magical pocket watch to look at frozen moments of death on a 19th-century ghost ship to figure out who killed who.
A cute visual novel about writing poetry for high school girls that definitely doesn't turn into psychological horror.
Wandering in a dark forest trying to find pieces of paper before a tall, faceless man in a suit catches me.
Playing as a floppy golden retriever trying to dropkick a fuzzy dinosaur off a submarine.
